# RivalEdge

RivalEdge is an AI-native competitive intelligence and market visibility platform. We help B2B companies track competitors, monitor AI citations, and optimize for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

## Product

RivalEdge combines two core capabilities:

1. **Competitive Intelligence (CI)** — Automated monitoring of competitor websites, pricing pages, and product updates. Weekly AI-powered briefings tell you what changed and what to do about it.

2. **Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)** — AI visibility tools and services that help brands get cited by ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI. Includes llms.txt generation, robots.txt optimization, schema markup, and monthly citation tracking.

## Key Features

- Competitor tracking (up to 20 competitors)
- Weekly/daily AI digest emails
- Battle card generator for sales teams
- GEO audit and scoring (100-point system)
- AI citation monitoring across 5 platforms
- llms.txt and robots.txt auto-generation
- Schema markup implementation
- Slack integration
- API access

## Pricing

| Tier | Price | Best For |
|------|-------|----------|
| Solo | $49/mo | Indie founders, small teams |
| Pro | $99/mo | Growing teams and agencies |
| GEO Self-Service | $299/mo | DIY GEO optimization |
| GEO Managed | $999/mo | Done-for-you GEO services |
| AI Intelligence Partner | Custom ($2,500+/mo) | Full competitive intelligence + strategy |

## Use Cases

- SaaS & B2B companies tracking competitor moves
- eCommerce brands monitoring pricing changes
- Agencies managing competitive intel for clients
- Healthcare & professional services
- Fintech & financial services
- DTC & CPG brands

## Comparison

Unlike traditional SEO tools, RivalEdge focuses on:
- AI-native competitive intelligence (not just rankings)
- Generative Engine Optimization (not just search optimization)
- Real-time competitor monitoring (not just periodic audits)
